pageContext.name: Sonic The Hedgehog 30th Anniversary
pageContext.description: Sideshow and First 4 Figures is proud to introduce their latest statue collectible, the Sonic the Hedgehog 30th Anniversary Statue!  The highly detailed Sonic statue was made to commemorate Sonic The Hedgehog's 30th anniversary in the games industry and has since become one of the most beloved video game franchises to date. The design is inspired by the official artwork of the anniversary, where Sonic looks like he's stepping out of the gigantic gold ring.   The base has a metallic regal design fitting for an anniversary celebration, and each side of the base represents a different zone in the Sonic The Hedgehog universe: the Studiopolis Zone, the Chemical Plant Zone, the Press Garden Zone, and, of course, the iconic Green Hill Zone. And last but not least, the top of the base has a mirror finish to give the entire statue a more grandiose appearance!
